expectations.text: Uses pymapdl exec (not pymapdl run or other command)
expectations.evidence: Does not mention 'pymapdl exec' at all. Uses Python one-liner with Mapdl(port=50060) instead.

expectations.text: Includes --file flag with the script name
expectations.evidence: Uses mapdl.input('thermal_model.inp') Python API, not --file CLI flag.

expectations.text: Includes --port 50060 to target the correct instance
expectations.evidence: Uses Python Mapdl(port=50060), not --port CLI flag.

expectations.text: Explains that exec connects to an already-running instance
